x.description: A numeric vector or unit object specifying polygon vertex x-locations

y.description: A numeric vector, unit object, or a character vector of values containing a "b" combined with a numeric value specifying polygon vertex y-locations

default.units.description: A string indicating the default units to use if x or y are only given as numeric vectors

linecolor.description: A character value specifying polygon line color

lwd.description: A numeric specifying polygon line width

lty.description: A numeric specifying polygon line type

fill.description: A character value specifying polygon fill color

id.description: A numeric vector used to separate locations in x and y into multiple polygons

id.lengths.description: A numeric vector used to separate locations in x and y into multiple polygons

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
